languages.text: Дешевый и прочный скалобетон служит основным строительным материалом в Империуме.

languages.text: Cheap and durable, rockcrete is used as the main building material throughout the Imperium.

traits.locale_text: Cheap and durable, this substance is used to build most anything in the Imperium.

languages.text: Bon marché et durable, le béton de roche est utilisé comme principal matériau de construction dans tout l'Imperium.

languages.text: Barato y duradero, el hormigón rocoso se utiliza como principal material de construcción en todo el Imperio.
